title: Costly Update
content:
Sending a message to [Twitter](http://twitter.com/macsf) via SMS costs 9 baht each time!!! (Well actually, I already knew that. Just want to share.)

![](https://macsfvent.sgp1.cdn.digitaloceanspaces.com/media/2007/06/twitter_txt.jpg)

Good thing life is not quite active lately. --"
